ember_adaptation: Use as-is on dark bg with Ember tokens
ember_notes: Excellent foundation for Ember. Replace white bg with var(--color-bg), black text with var(--color-text). Grid structure maps perfectly.

ember_adaptation: Use Flat Design with subtle surface elevation instead
ember_notes: Neumorphism requires light backgrounds to work. Replace with var(--color-surface-1/2/3) layering on Ember dark base.

ember_adaptation: Use surface vars with low opacity border; skip blur on OLED
ember_notes: Glass blur effect works on dark if used sparingly. Replace glass tint with var(--color-surface-2) at 40% opacity. One panel max.

ember_adaptation: Use with Ember tokens; uppercase Syne, stark borders
ember_notes: Strong Ember alignment. Hard edges, high contrast. Replace custom hex with var(--color-accent) for yellow/amber moments.

ember_adaptation: Use Dimensional Layering or subtle depth via surface vars
ember_notes: Full 3D rendering conflicts with Ember restraint principle. Use z-index surface layering and subtle shadows only.

ember_adaptation: Use block structure; replace vibrant palette with Ember tokens
ember_notes: Block grid composition compatible. Replace rainbow blocks with var(--color-surface-1/2/3). Amber for single accent block only.

ember_adaptation: Use with var(--color-bg) #0B0B0A as base
ember_notes: Native Ember style. var(--color-bg) is already OLED-optimised. Pair with var(--color-text) and var(--color-text-muted).

ember_adaptation: WCAG AAA target with Ember tokens; use --color-text-muted carefully
ember_notes: Compatible. Verify var(--color-text-muted) on var(--color-bg) meets 4.5:1 minimum. Amber on dark exceeds 3:1, verify body text separately.

ember_adaptation: Use Soft UI Evolution or subtle border-radius elevation instead
ember_notes: Bright pastel clays incompatible with Ember dark palette. Replace with surface-1/2/3 rounding and subtle shadows.

ember_adaptation: Use Gradient Mesh adapted to amber only; avoid rainbow aurora
ember_notes: Multi-hue aurora conflicts with one-accent-per-viewport rule. If using gradient, amber-to-transparent only.

ember_adaptation: Use IBM Plex Mono + Syne combo; replace neon palette with amber only
ember_notes: The typographic and structural aspects align. Replace neon rainbow with amber-only accent. Dark OLED base natural fit.

ember_adaptation: Use with Ember surface tokens; flat is Ember default
ember_notes: Core Ember style. All components are flat-first. Use var(--color-surface-1/2/3) for hierarchy without shadows.

ember_adaptation: Use Flat Design or Material You instead
ember_notes: Textures and 3D objects conflict with Ember principles. Replace entirely with flat token-based design.

ember_adaptation: Single frosted panel only; use surface-2 with backdrop-filter sparingly
ember_notes: Heavy glass conflicts with OLED performance and restraint. If used: one element, var(--color-surface-2), subtle only.

ember_adaptation: Use only filament sweep + breathing border; no decorative motion
ember_notes: Motion must communicate state, not decorate. Filament sweep for loading, breathing border for active. Remove scroll-driven decoration.

ember_adaptation: State-only micro-interactions; 200-250ms transitions max
ember_notes: Compatible when motion = state feedback. Hover states on interactive elements allowed. No decorative micro-animations.

ember_adaptation: WCAG AAA target; high contrast mode supported via tokens
ember_notes: Full compatibility. Ember token system designed for accessibility. var(--color-text) on var(--color-bg) verified.

ember_adaptation: Minimal chrome approach; use NavBar + FooterBlock only when needed
ember_notes: Philosophy aligns with Ember restraint. Reduce chrome to minimum. Content-first. Amber only for essential interactions.

ember_adaptation: Use surface layering (surface-1/2/3) instead of soft shadows; keep subtle depth
ember_notes: Dark soft UI with surface vars. Replace light pastels with Ember surface tokens. Subtle border instead of soft glow.

ember_adaptation: Use HeroPane component as dominant first element
ember_notes: Core Ember composition pattern. Hero pane is always the dominant element. Syne at display scale for hero copy.

ember_adaptation: Amber CTA only; one primary CTA per viewport section
ember_notes: Compatible with restraint. Single amber button per section. No competing CTAs. Clear hierarchy to action.

ember_adaptation: Use ServiceList for features; avoid equal-weight card grids
ember_notes: Avoid 3-col equal-weight grid. Use ServiceList with hierarchy. IBM Plex Mono for spec data. Syne for feature names.

ember_adaptation: Use with Ember restraint; single amber CTA
ember_notes: Native Ember landing pattern. Minimal copy, clear hierarchy, one action per section.

ember_adaptation: Use TestimonialRail component; IBM Plex Mono for metrics
ember_notes: Compatible. TestimonialRail component purpose-built. IBM Plex Mono for stat numbers. Amber for featured testimonial.

ember_adaptation: Use HeroPane with embed; filament sweep on demo load
ember_notes: Interactive element must not compete with amber accent. Filament sweep on load state. Minimal chrome around demo.

ember_adaptation: Use AuthorityHero + TeamGrid; restraint principle dominant
ember_notes: Core Ember pattern for professional services. AuthorityHero component + StatsCard for credentials.

ember_adaptation: Use composition principle; no scroll-jacking or parallax
ember_notes: Story through layout hierarchy, not animation. Syne for narrative headlines. No decorative scroll effects.

ember_adaptation: Use DataTable + KPIStrip; IBM Plex Mono for all data
ember_notes: Native Ember dashboard pattern. Dense data on dark bg with IBM Plex Mono. Surface vars for hierarchy.

ember_adaptation: Use color-as-information principle; limit to amber/green/red spectrum
ember_notes: Color encoding must use Ember token palette. No rainbow heatmaps. Use amber=medium, red=critical, green=good.

ember_adaptation: Use KPIStrip + StatsCard; Syne for KPI labels
ember_notes: Native Ember dashboard. KPIStrip component built for this. Syne for metric names, IBM Plex Mono for values.

ember_adaptation: Filament sweep on live data; breathing border on active streams
ember_notes: Core Ember pattern. Filament sweep indicates live data loading. Breathing border on active monitors.

ember_adaptation: Use DataTable + ActivityFeed with expandable rows
ember_notes: Compatible. DataTable with drill-down states. IBM Plex Mono for all metric values.

ember_adaptation: Use DataTable with delta indicators; color-as-information for deltas
ember_notes: IBM Plex Mono for comparison values. Green/red for positive/negative deltas. No rainbow comparison bars.

ember_adaptation: Use DataTable + StatsCard; amber for uncertainty/confidence markers
ember_notes: No decorative data viz. IBM Plex Mono for model outputs. Amber for confidence intervals or predictions to watch.

ember_adaptation: Use ActivityFeed + DataTable; breathing border on live user sessions
ember_notes: Native Ember dashboard. ActivityFeed for events. Breathing border on active user count.

ember_adaptation: IBM Plex Mono for all numbers; green/red strict for delta only
ember_notes: Native Ember pattern. Strict color-as-information. Amber for account alerts, never for decorative purposes.

ember_adaptation: Use KPIStrip + DataTable + ActivityFeed; amber for pipeline focus items
ember_notes: Ember authority + data. IBM Plex Mono for deal values. Amber on deals needing attention.

ember_adaptation: Use with Syne bold, stark borders, amber on black; no softening
ember_notes: Strong Ember alignment. Hard-edged, high contrast. Use var(--color-accent) as the brutal accent. Borders as structure.

ember_adaptation: Use with hierarchy; hero cell must be dominant; no equal-weight bento
ember_notes: Structure is compatible, but cells must have clear visual hierarchy. One dominant cell, others recede. No equal-weight grid.

ember_adaptation: Use Retro-minimal or Flat Design instead
ember_notes: Chrome gradients and pixelated aesthetics conflict with Ember principles. Replace with dark retro-minimal.

ember_adaptation: Use IBM Plex Mono + dark OLED + amber; remove neon blue/purple/green
ember_notes: Structure and dark palette align. Replace neon palette with amber-only accent. IBM Plex Mono for terminal-style data.

ember_adaptation: Use Nature Distilled or clean minimal with natural photo only
ember_notes: Organic textures and earthy greens conflict with Ember dark precision. Replace with clean dark + strategic nature photography.

ember_adaptation: Use filament sweep for AI generation states; IBM Plex Mono for outputs
ember_notes: Strong Ember alignment. Filament sweep for streaming outputs. Amber for AI action triggers. No purple AI clichés.

ember_adaptation: Use Brutalism or Neubrutalism instead
ember_notes: Rainbow geometric patterns conflict with Ember one-accent rule. Replace with single amber geometric accent on dark.

ember_adaptation: Use Dark Futurist or adapted Cyberpunk (amber-only) instead
ember_notes: Purple/cyan/pink palette fundamentally incompatible with Ember. No adaptation path.

ember_adaptation: Use surface-1/2/3 tokens for depth; no decorative shadows
ember_notes: Native Ember depth system. Surface tokens create layering without fake shadows. Z-index hierarchy.

ember_adaptation: Core Ember expression; large Syne at display scale, vast whitespace
ember_notes: Strongest Ember alignment possible. Large type, dark canvas, single amber moment. Restraint principle embodied.

ember_adaptation: Use only for state changes, not decoration; Syne for animated text
ember_notes: Typography motion must communicate state (loading, updating). Remove purely decorative kinetic elements. Syne for animated display text.

ember_adaptation: Use composition-based storytelling without scroll-jacking
ember_notes: Parallax conflicts with Ember motion principles. Motion = state only. Replace with layout-based narrative hierarchy.

ember_adaptation: Use grid-based composition with Syne + IBM Plex Mono; dark version
ember_notes: Excellent Ember alignment. Grid structure, typographic hierarchy, functional design. Apply dark Ember palette.

ember_adaptation: Use IBM Plex Mono + amber for HUD elements; remove neon palette
ember_notes: Dark OLED and mono font align. Replace neon accents with amber-only. Filament sweep on scanning/loading states.

ember_adaptation: Use Brutalism or Neubrutalism instead
ember_notes: Pixel art aesthetic requires specific rendering that conflicts with Ember principles. No adaptation path.

ember_adaptation: Same as Bento Box Grid (#39); hierarchy required; no equal-weight cells
ember_notes: See style 39. Apply same Ember hierarchy rules. One dominant cell per bento grid section.

ember_adaptation: Use glass sparingly (one panel); amber for spatial focal points
ember_notes: Glass panels can work if limited to one per viewport. Ember spatial layer uses surface vars, not raw blur.

ember_adaptation: Apply dark-mode inversion; use --color-bg as paper base with high contrast
ember_notes: The minimalism and typography focus align. Invert to dark: var(--color-bg) as dark paper, var(--color-text) at high contrast.

ember_adaptation: Use Neubrutalism as structured alternative
ember_notes: Fundamentally incompatible with Ember restraint. One accent per viewport rule eliminates maximalism.

ember_adaptation: Use Nature Distilled with Ember tokens instead
ember_notes: Organic shapes and natural textures conflict with Ember precision. Use strategic nature photography on clean dark base.

ember_adaptation: Use Neubrutalism structure; stark but not broken; amber as single raw accent
ember_notes: Raw aesthetic can work with Ember if structured. Neubrutalism rules: hard edges, Syne bold, amber-only.

ember_adaptation: Use flat interaction states + micro-interactions (200ms max) instead
ember_notes: Physical deformation effects conflict with Ember motion principles. State feedback only, no decorative deformation.

ember_adaptation: Use clean dark base with strategic nature photography; no earthy palette tokens
ember_notes: Natural imagery on dark editorial base works. Apply Ember tokens for all UI elements, nature only in photography.

ember_adaptation: Single custom cursor; no cursor trail; amber for cursor accent state
ember_notes: Custom cursor aligned if minimal. No trailing particles. Amber dot cursor on hover of primary interactive element.

ember_adaptation: Filament sweep for voice processing states; amber for active listening indicator
ember_notes: Motion principles apply. Filament sweep on voice processing. Breathing border on active listening mode.

ember_adaptation: Embed 3D viewer in HeroPane; amber for rotate/interact CTA; minimal surrounding UI
ember_notes: 3D product in hero is compatible if contained. Surrounding UI follows Ember restraint. No competing 3D elements.

ember_adaptation: Amber-to-transparent gradient only; no multi-hue mesh
ember_notes: Multi-hue aurora incompatible. If gradient used: amber (#F5A623) to transparent, one occurrence, below hero fold.

ember_adaptation: Use composition principle with Syne for editorial headings
ember_notes: Strong Ember alignment. Editorial composition is a core pattern. Syne at display scale for article titles.

ember_adaptation: Use subtle glow effect (amber only) or no effect instead
ember_notes: RGB split requires multiple accent colors. Incompatible with one-accent rule. Replace with subtle amber glow on hover.

ember_adaptation: Use dark editorial base + grain texture (subtle); amber as vintage warmth; IBM Plex Mono for metadata
ember_notes: Dark film grain can work. Use very subtle grain texture, amber as vintage warmth, IBM Plex Mono for metadata captions.

ember_adaptation: Use with Syne for display, geometric grid, amber as single Bauhaus accent color
ember_notes: Excellent Ember alignment. Bauhaus principles: typography, geometry, single primary color (amber). Dark base version.

ember_adaptation: Use var(--color-bg) to var(--color-text) spectrum; amber for single accent
ember_notes: Core Ember mobile expression. Monochrome dark with single amber moment. Syne + IBM Plex Mono.

ember_adaptation: Native Ember mobile pattern; full-bleed dark, Syne, amber CTA
ember_notes: Most direct Ember mobile style. Full-bleed dark canvas, Syne at display scale, amber action.

ember_adaptation: Use with KPIStrip, IBM Plex Mono, amber for upgrade CTAs
ember_notes: Strong Ember alignment. Data-forward mobile layout with IBM Plex Mono. Amber on upsell/upgrade.

ember_adaptation: IBM Plex Mono dominant; amber for command prompt cursor; dark OLED base
ember_notes: Native Ember technical aesthetic. IBM Plex Mono at full scale. Amber for active prompt/output.

ember_adaptation: Use Syne bold + stark borders; remove scroll-driven animations; amber as brutal accent
ember_notes: Brutalism structure aligns. Remove kinetic/scroll elements conflicting with motion-as-state rule. Amber-only accent.

ember_adaptation: Use surface tokens for touch targets; amber for primary touch CTA
ember_notes: Native Ember mobile base. Surface vars for hierarchy. 44px minimum touch target. Amber on primary action.

ember_adaptation: Use Ember tokens instead of Material color system; keep dynamic sizing; remove color extraction
ember_notes: Adaptive sizing and motion principles can be borrowed. Replace Material color system entirely with Ember tokens.

ember_adaptation: Use with Syne bold + stark borders + amber accent; dark OLED base
ember_notes: Strong Ember mobile alignment. Hard edges, high contrast Syne, amber-only. Dark background natural.

ember_adaptation: Syne 800 at max scale; amber for featured word/phrase; dark canvas
ember_notes: Core Ember mobile expression. Syne at maximum weight and scale. Single amber text highlight.

ember_adaptation: Use IBM Plex Mono for body; Syne for section titles; remove serif fonts
ember_notes: Academic structure aligns but typography must convert. No serif fonts in Ember. IBM Plex Mono + Syne replaces.

ember_adaptation: IBM Plex Mono + dark OLED + amber only; remove neon blue/green/purple
ember_notes: Dark HUD structure aligns. Replace neon palette with amber-only. IBM Plex Mono for all HUD data.

ember_adaptation: IBM Plex Mono for wallet/price data; amber for highlighted values; remove neon
ember_notes: Financial data display aligns. IBM Plex Mono for crypto data. Amber for prices/alerts. No neon accent overload.

ember_adaptation: Use flat surface-var elevation (surface-1/2/3) instead
ember_notes: Clay pastel elements incompatible with Ember dark. Replace with surface token hierarchy.

ember_adaptation: Native Ember professional pattern; IBM Plex Mono for data, Syne for nav
ember_notes: Direct Ember mobile alignment. Dark professional base, data-forward, amber for premium/upgrade actions.

ember_adaptation: Use Neubrutalism (structured raw aesthetic) instead
ember_notes: Hand-drawn textures incompatible with Ember precision. Replace with raw but structured neubrutalism.

ember_adaptation: Use flat surface elevation (surface-1/2/3) instead
ember_notes: Same as desktop neumorphism. Light backgrounds required. Replace with dark surface layering.
